description: Use this API to disconnect all of the fixed shunts from the specified bus and reconnect them to a designated bus. Bus TOBUS must not have any fixed shunt connected to it at the time this API is called. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = moveshunts(ibus, newbus)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus on which one or more fixed shunts currently exist. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newbus
parameters.description: Bus to which the fixed shunts on bus ibus are to be moved. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no fixed shunts at bus IBUS.
IBUS and NEWBUS are the same bus.
NEWBUS already has fixed shunts (move individual shunts).
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
